_comment: MCP server dependencies for the running-coach plugin. The Garmin MCP is OPTIONAL — the plugin works without it via manual data input fallbacks. Install garmin-mcp from https://github.com/Gasper0/garmin-mcp if you want full Garmin Connect integration. The paths below are TEMPLATES — replace ${HOME}/garmin-mcp with the actual path where you cloned garmin-mcp on your machine.
